prompt: Create a delicate anime-style Japanese ink wash and watercolor illustration on warm off-white textured paper. The scene features exactly 2 young twin-like girls standing close together in the foreground, gently holding hands and leaning their heads together with soft, tired but content smiles. The left girl has short powder-blue hair, blue eyes, and a blue floral kimono with a large blue obi bow, white sakura patterns, tassel ornaments, and small cherry blossoms pinned in her hair. The right girl has short pastel-pink hair, pink eyes, and a pale pink floral kimono with a large rose-pink obi bow, gold accents, tassel ornaments, and cherry blossom hair accessories. Use refined linework, translucent watercolor washes, splattered ink textures, and soft luminous shading. Behind them, paint a misty monochrome sumi-e landscape with exactly 3 main background elements: a pale red sun or moon near the upper left-center, a faint mountain range in gray ink, and a distant Japanese temple gate or shrine structure on the upper right. Add cherry blossom branches across the top and right side, with many soft pink blossoms and dark expressive ink strokes. On the left side, include one vertical column of bold black Japanese brush calligraphy reading 本日もお疲れさまでした, plus a small red seal stamp near the lower left. Composition should be vertical portrait format, romantic and serene, blending traditional Japanese sumi-e, watercolor, and polished modern anime character art, with an elegant spring-night farewell atmosphere.
